findings.title: Nested HLS Sub-Playlist Direct Load (CORS Blocker)
findings.description: Variant playlists (e.g. .m3u8 files fetched via the asset proxy) were served verbatim, causing the browser HLS player to query remote HLS URLs directly and fail due to CORS restrictions.
findings.remediation: Intercept fetched sub-playlists inside the Flask asset proxy endpoint, decode and rewrite their URIs using the backend rewrite engine, and serve the modified HLS playlist payload.
